subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath caused the light of the Covenant to shine forth across the horizons and hath manifested the mysteries of the Testament in the realm of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اشرق بنور المیثاق علی الافاق و اظهر اسرار العهد فی حیز الشهود
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
